changelog: v1.5.25: Nuclear CI fix -- skip GPUtil entirely when CI=true.
changes: FIX: _get_gpus() returns [] immediately when CI=true -- no nvidia-smi subprocess, no hang
FIX: ThreadPoolExecutor timeout alone insufficient -- blocked subprocess outlives the future
FIX: VER string corrected (was stuck at 1.5.21 since v1.5.22 due to sed target mismatch)
